narrative:
Cols 65-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 752 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.1 percentage points.
